name: Logic C — WhatsApp Bridge (Aidan Command Router)

parameters.jsCode:
const now = new Date().toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: 'America/New_York' });
return [{ json: { reply: `*AIDAN MORNING BRIEF*
${now} EST

*EAF (Non-Profit)*
- Form 1023: In preparation
- MEIA Capstone: April 14, 2026
- CAKO Cohort 1: Month 4 target

*FP (For-Profit)*
- 3PL logs active
- Infrastructure inspection pipeline

*MONK / AKMS*
- Prototype v1.0 in development
- Provisional patent pending

Reply *help* for full menu.` } }];

const text = $('Parse Intent').first().json.text;
return [{ json: { reply: `*MONK / AKMS Tech Brief*
Query: "${text}"

- MONK v1.0 prototype in development
- MEIA Capstone: April 14, 2026
- Patent: Via James Scott Esq.
- Advisor: Dr. Alexander Kott (Former Chief Scientist, ARL)
- AKMS: Autonomous swarm OS
- CAKO: 12-16 week drone certification

Check /data/Aidan_Outputs/ for full report.` } }];

return [{ json: { reply: `*AIDAN Command Menu*

*EAF / Grants*
- grant status
- EARN grant

*FP / Logistics*
- 3pl status
- inventory check

*Briefings*
- morning briefing
- status

*MONK / Tech*
- monk status
- CAKO status
- architect

*Actions*
- ACK [ShipmentID]
- help` } }];

const text = $('Parse Intent').first().json.text;
return [{ json: { reply: `Aidan did not recognize: "${text}"\nReply *help* for the command menu.` } }];
